title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: Video presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agents: semantic tool selection to filter context window inputs, graph RAG for precise multi-hop queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails implemented in code, and runtime steering to enable self-correction. Demonstrates each approach with a travel agent built using Strands Agents framework.
